text: Verified purchase. The serum absorbed quickly and did not irritate my sensitive skin. I noticed brighter skin after two weeks.
The bottle arrived leaking and the pump was broken. I wanted a refund because half the product was gone.
The hair dryer stopped working after one month. Heat setting is unstable and I need warranty support.
Good travel size dryer and folds easily. It is loud but works for short trips.
I never received the license key email and support told me to check spam. I need delivery or cancellation.
OCR worked well on scanned receipts and the PDF editor was easy to use on Windows.
The subscription renewed before I expected. I want to cancel and understand the refund policy.
Backup was simple to set up for my family account. Restore speed is acceptable.
Delivery was late and the baby monitor battery drained overnight. I may return it if replacement is not available.
Night vision is clear and two way audio helps a lot. The temperature alert is useful for the nursery.
The glass bottles are easy to clean and the slow flow nipple reduced gas for our baby.
Bottle quality is good but one cap was missing from the package. Customer service should replace the missing part.
